title: dryopteris sancta var. balbisii
intro: Dryopteris sancta var. balbisii, also known as Balbis' male fern, is a variety of the Dryopteris sancta plant, a species of fern commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris sancta var. balbisii include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent to reduce pain and swelling. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
